name: Kabir Malhotra
bio: Started AI-SEC Community in 2025 after one too many hallway conversations about how few rooms bring AI and security people together.

name: Simran Kaur
bio: Runs the WhatsApp community and newsletter, and makes sure every new member finds their way into a conversation, not just a mailing list.

name: Aditya Sharma
bio: Designs the hands-on workshop curriculum and recruits practitioners willing to teach the attack techniques they actually use.

name: Neha Verma
bio: Manages sponsor relationships and chapter expansion, and vets every partner against the community's no-vendor-pitch rule.
